use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MILD TO MODERATE DEMENTIA OF THE ALZHEIMER'S TYPE

indications.text:
ZUNVEYL is indicated for the treatment of mild to moderate dementia of the Alzheimer’s type
in adults.
